notes:
The game is working perfectly however it has a problem with the LOS and LOS AREA tools, more info here 
https://steamcommunity.com/app/521800/discussions/0/1735462352492629085/
This problem can be reduced including in the parameters steam launcher of the game the option 
PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 %command%
However although the tools work the map remains black.
It's a pity because the game looks great.
title: Command Ops 2

notes: When launching, "Match screen resolution" does not work; choose wide screen 1920x1080 in my case. Tool "Line of Sight" and "LOS Area" does not work. When game launch with parameter "PROTON_USE_WINED3D11=1 %command%" LOS does work but we loose the map; map turns black; so LOS is worth nothing. Bombarb order took a couple of seconds before to show the reticle. Other than that, it works and we can play.
title: Command Ops 2
